test.notes: All tests pass: 44+10+7+52+9+22+15+7+109 = 275 tests pass across all crates. Compiler warnings present (unused variables, dead code) but tests succeed.

typecheck.notes: Clippy fails with -D warnings. Errors: (1) unused variable `policy_ranges` in crates/wasm-runtime-interface/src/network.rs:317, (2) doc_lazy_continuation in vendor/bittensor-rs/src/subtensor.rs:328, (3) dead_code: SdkResponse, SdkResponseToolCall, SdkResponseFunctionCall, SdkUsage structs never constructed in crates/wasm-runtime-interface/src/llm.rs:605-627, (4) function parse_openai_response never used in llm.rs:687, (5) methods resolve_and_validate_ip and validate_ip_against_policy never used in network.rs:505-536, (6) type_complexity in crates/wasm-runtime-interface/src/storage.rs:308

lint.notes: Formatting differences found in multiple files: bins/platform-sudo/src/main.rs, bins/validator-node/src/main.rs, scripts/test-command-execution/src/main.rs, scripts/validate-test-commands/src/main.rs, scripts/validate-workspace-yaml/src/main.rs, tests/error_cases.rs, vendor/bittensor-rs/src/crv4/drand.rs. Mostly line-length and argument formatting issues.

reviewsSummary.skippedReason: Validators failed (clippy and fmt). Feature review was not attempted per scrutiny procedure.

blockingIssues.description: cargo clippy -- -D warnings fails with exit code 101. Multiple dead_code errors in wasm-runtime-interface (SdkResponse/SdkResponseToolCall/SdkResponseFunctionCall/SdkUsage structs, parse_openai_response fn, resolve_and_validate_ip/validate_ip_against_policy methods), unused variable policy_ranges in network.rs, doc_lazy_continuation in vendor/bittensor-rs, and type_complexity in storage.rs.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Either (a) add #[allow(dead_code)] annotations to intentionally unused items, or (b) remove unused code, or (c) prefix unused variables with underscore. For type_complexity, factor the return type into a type alias. For doc_lazy_continuation, add indentation to the doc comment continuation line.

blockingIssues.description: cargo fmt -- --check fails with exit code 1. Multiple files have formatting differences from the canonical style enforced by rustfmt.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Run `cargo fmt` to auto-fix all formatting issues across the workspace.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for workers to run `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` before completing any Rust feature, and fix all issues before committing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple features in dataset-validation milestone were completed with clippy warnings and formatting inconsistencies, causing the scrutiny validator to fail.
